name: Callaway Golf Company
description: Topgolf Callaway Brands Corp. is an American global sports equipment and entertainment company that designs, manufactures, markets, and sells premium golf equipment, including clubs, balls, and accessories. Beyond its core golf business, the company operates a diverse portfolio of brands such as Odyssey, TravisMathew, and OGIO, and owns the Topgolf technology-enabled entertainment business. Founded in 1982 and headquartered in Carlsbad, California, the company distributes its products in more than 70 countries worldwide, positioning itself as a leader in both the professional golf equipment market and the modern golf entertainment industry.
